---
title: "test_1772386478.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/gauntlet/test_1772386478.py"
loc: 7
complexity: 2
logic_score: 9.38
style_score: 9.31
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 6.52
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_pass. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)

### Exports
- `test_pass`
